findings.description: The hints for s1 are missing PATTERN1 and NAME_WITH_VALUE, which are column names that appear directly in the code examples (CodeUtil.getValues("0001", "PATTERN1") and CodeUtil.getOptionalName("0001", "1", "NAME_WITH_VALUE")). Users searching for these specific column/parameter names would not be routed to this section.
findings.source_evidence: Source contains: `List<String> values = CodeUtil.getValues("0001", "PATTERN1");` and `String name = CodeUtil.getOptionalName("0001", "1", "NAME_WITH_VALUE");`
